dragDropOrClick: Drag and drop a PDF here, or click to upload
uploadHint: Runs locally in your browser. No uploads.
selectionDescription: Use page ranges or the page grid. Hold Shift while clicking page tiles to add a range.
outputDescription: Choose whether the selected pages become one PDF or several files.
resultsDescription: Generated files stay in this browser tab until you pick another PDF or change the selection.
noFileDescription: Upload a PDF to choose pages and generate a split result.
loadingDescription: Opening the document and counting pages.
emptySelectionDescription: Select at least one page before generating an output file.
emptyResultDescription: Generate a result after selecting the pages you want to keep.
pageGridDescription: Use the thumbnails to identify pages. Selected pages are highlighted.
unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please choose a PDF file.
invalidPdf: Failed to read the PDF. Please choose a valid PDF file.
encryptedPdf: This PDF is encrypted. Remove the owner password before splitting it.
rangeEmpty: Enter at least one page range.
rangeInvalid: Use numbers and ranges separated by commas, such as 1-3,5,8.
rangeOutOfBounds: The range contains pages outside this PDF.
rangeDescending: Range start cannot be greater than range end.
rangeDuplicate: Each page can only appear once in the range expression.
workerUnsupported: This browser cannot run the PDF worker required for splitting.
splitFailed: Failed to generate the split PDF files.
zipFailed: The PDF files were generated, but the ZIP archive could not be created.
